eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Elmore, ID; at 7:10 PM on JUN 15, 2026 Effective until 12:10 AM JUN 16, 2026. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Brush fire Old Hwy 30 and N Medbury Hill Dr which is moving towards S Moose Dr. Watch for fire, prepare supplies and evacuate if needed.
